Backlog dashboard for follow-up actioning, ETA ageing and merged ticket tracking.
Primary data loaded: embedded sample Secondary ETA data loaded: embedded sample Admin mode: off

Admin settings

Password is required to edit what counts as Follow-up Required. This setting is saved in the browser for this dashboard file.
Follow-up Required is based on Ticket Progress Status
Current rule
Selected statuses below will count towards the Follow-up Required widget and table marker.

Backlog tickets

Base data excludes Customer = Transport for NSW, Region = Metro, Ticket Status = Complete/Cancelled, and keeps Device Service starting with CLM, SLM, FLM or Retail only.
